extensions.name: figma-mcp
extensions.description: Bridge to Figma Desktop's local MCP server over SSE — exposes Figma design file tools and resources via renre-kit query.

extensions.name: context7-mcp
extensions.description: Bridge to Context7 — fetch up-to-date, version-specific documentation for any library directly into your prompt context.

extensions.name: atlassian-mcp
extensions.description: Bridge to Atlassian Jira and Confluence via the mcp-atlassian MCP server — search issues, read pages, manage tickets and wiki content.

extensions.name: sdd-workflow
extensions.description: Structured Design-Driven workflow for AI agents — plan tasks with ADRs and diagrams, implement phase-by-phase using Ralph loop, and verify plan-vs-implementation parity.
